memberdef.definition: using cip::MonotonicCubicInterp1D = typedef CubicInterp<T, SlopePolicy<SlopeMethod::Monotonic>, 1, IM>
memberdef.name: MonotonicCubicInterp1D

memberdef.definition: using cip::MakimaCubicInterp1D = typedef CubicInterp<T, SlopePolicy<SlopeMethod::Makima>, 1, IM>
memberdef.name: MakimaCubicInterp1D

memberdef.type: CubicInterp< T, SlopePolicy< SlopeMethod::Natural, BC >, 1, IM >
memberdef.definition: using cip::NaturalCubicInterp1D = typedef CubicInterp<T, SlopePolicy<SlopeMethod::Natural, BC>, 1, IM>
memberdef.name: NaturalCubicInterp1D

memberdef.type: CubicInterp< T, SlopePolicy< SlopeMethod::Natural, BC >, 1, IM >
memberdef.definition: using cip::NaturalPeriodicCubicInterp1D = typedef CubicInterp<T, SlopePolicy<SlopeMethod::Natural, BC>, 1, IM>
memberdef.name: NaturalPeriodicCubicInterp1D

memberdef.type: CubicInterp< T, SlopePolicy< SlopeMethod::Monotonic >, N, IM >
memberdef.definition: using cip::MonotonicCubicInterp2D = typedef CubicInterp<T, SlopePolicy<SlopeMethod::Monotonic>, N, IM>
memberdef.name: MonotonicCubicInterp2D

memberdef.type: CubicInterp< T, SlopePolicy< SlopeMethod::Makima >, N, IM >
memberdef.definition: using cip::MakimaCubicInterp2D = typedef CubicInterp<T, SlopePolicy<SlopeMethod::Makima>, N, IM>
memberdef.name: MakimaCubicInterp2D

memberdef.type: CubicInterp< T, SlopePolicy< SlopeMethod::Natural, BC >, N, IM >
memberdef.definition: using cip::NaturalCubicInterp2D = typedef CubicInterp<T, SlopePolicy<SlopeMethod::Natural, BC>, N, IM>
memberdef.name: NaturalCubicInterp2D

memberdef.type: CubicInterp< T, SlopePolicy< SlopeMethod::Natural, BC >, N, IM >
memberdef.definition: using cip::NaturalPeriodicCubicInterp2D = typedef CubicInterp<T, SlopePolicy<SlopeMethod::Natural, BC>, N, IM>
memberdef.name: NaturalPeriodicCubicInterp2D

memberdef.type: CubicInterp< T, SlopePolicy< SlopeMethod::Natural, BC >, N, IM >
memberdef.definition: using cip::NaturalCubicInterp3D = typedef CubicInterp<T, SlopePolicy<SlopeMethod::Natural, BC>, N, IM>
memberdef.name: NaturalCubicInterp3D
